# Extensions.KnownClientCapabilityFields property

The core (recognized) client capability field names a receiver of this SDK revision understands (spec R-6.6-a – R-6.6-c, R-6.6-f). Any field not in this set is unknown and MUST be tolerated and ignored. Mirrors the fields on `ClientCapabilities`.

```csharp
public static IReadOnlySet<string> KnownClientCapabilityFields { get; }
```
